title: Carry out regular livestock observation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out regular livestock observation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work with livestock

pcs.text: Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary.

pcs.text: Discuss tasks with other workers who may be affected to ensure continued smooth operation of the process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss tasks with other workers who may be affected to ensure continued smooth operation of the process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss tasks with other workers who may be affected to ensure continued smooth operation of the process.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work with livestock

elements.title: Carry out livestock checks

pcs.text: Check livestock for signs of illness, injuries and abnormalities and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check livestock for signs of illness, injuries and abnormalities and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check livestock for signs of illness, injuries and abnormalities and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Carry out all husbandry and handling activities according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out all husbandry and handling activities according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out all husbandry and handling activities according to animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out livestock checks

elements.title: Deal with livestock emergencies

pcs.text: Follow workplace biosecurity policies as instructed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace biosecurity policies as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace biosecurity policies as instructed.

pcs.text: Recognise common signs of livestock injury or life-threatening conditions and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise common signs of livestock injury or life-threatening conditions and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise common signs of livestock injury or life-threatening conditions and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Use basic emergency and livestock first aid procedures until professional help arrives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use basic emergency and livestock first aid procedures until professional help arrives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use basic emergency and livestock first aid procedures until professional help arrives.

pcs.text: Report serious cuts and abrasions to livestock to the supervisor or veterinarian
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report serious cuts and abrasions to livestock to the supervisor or veterinarian?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report serious cuts and abrasions to livestock to the supervisor or veterinarian.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Deal with livestock emergencies

elements.title: Provide veterinary procedure support

pcs.text: Treat cuts, abrasions and bruises under instruction from the veterinarian or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Treat cuts, abrasions and bruises under instruction from the veterinarian or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat cuts, abrasions and bruises under instruction from the veterinarian or supervisor.

pcs.text: Examine animals for signs of distress, injury, illness and abnormal behaviours after completing procedures, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine animals for signs of distress, injury, illness and abnormal behaviours after completing procedures, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine animals for signs of distress, injury, illness and abnormal behaviours after completing procedures, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Apply appropriate treatment as instructed by supervisor or veterinarian
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply appropriate treatment as instructed by supervisor or veterinarian?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply appropriate treatment as instructed by supervisor or veterinarian.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Provide veterinary procedure support

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
